name: Ladybug
description: A Tier 2 neutral creature found across many of the park's early areas. It looks calm, but it is still one of the first real walls for players who arrive underprepared.
behavior: It wanders slowly with no clear route and sometimes lies down to sleep under broad leaves. In Grounded 2 it still has an O.R.C. variant and shares its broader niche with the Potato Beetle, a tougher relative in the veggie plots.
interactionWithPlayer: It stays neutral until attacked. While passive you can climb onto its back, but once angered it gains a special buck to throw riders off. It can also be distracted with Ladybug Bait and reacts aggressively if you carry a ladybug egg.
interactionWithCreatures: It rarely starts fights, but it retaliates hard when something hits it. As the Ladybuggy mount it stands out for its durability and water cannon, which also makes the wild version feel like the same creature translated into a straight fight.
strategy: It is still a serious early fight. Heavy weapons like the Red Ant Club work extremely well, but if perfect blocking is shaky, it is better to break the charge with terrain, roots, or tall grass before punishing the flank.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Bite: 75. Running Charge: 120. Side Hit: 100. Back Buck: 120.

inflicts: Its bite and charge deal chopping damage, while the side hit and back buck deal busting damage.

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: A basic blockable bite used at close range.

abilities.name: Running Charge
abilities.description: It pulls back, lines up, and charges straight at the player until it hits or runs out of room.

abilities.name: Side Hit
abilities.description: It shakes its body and slams sideways. It breaks guard unless you perfect block it.

abilities.name: Back Buck
abilities.description: It only uses this while someone is on top of it. It bucks violently to throw the rider off.

abilities.name: Roar
abilities.description: It winds up and roars, healing 150 health and gaining 25% damage plus 10% movement speed for 30 seconds.

abilities.name: Blocking Stance
abilities.description: It tucks its head into the shell and advances slowly. From the front it ignores light attacks until you interrupt it with a charged hit.
